channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Microsoft's massive Kenya AI data center would require switching off 'half the country' to meet power requirements, government says — $1 billion project stalls over capacity disagreements and lack of infrastructure
item.description: The project was supposed to bring a geothermal-powered data center to the Olkaria region in Kenya's Rift Valley. [Microsoft]

item.title: Alphabet Stock Dips 0.41% to $385 as Investors Digest Heavy AI Spending and Cloud Momentum
item.description: NEW YORK — Alphabet Inc. Class C shares (NASDAQ: GOOG) slipped 0.41% to $385.17 in midday trading Tuesday, giving back a portion of recent gains as Wall Street weighed the company's aggressive capital expenditure plans against its accelerating artificial inte… [Alphabet]

item.title: Healthcare Analytics Research Report 2026: A $181.34 Billion Market by 2031, Driven by Cost Optimization Pressures, Population Health Investments and Expanding Use of Cognitive Analytics Platforms
item.description: Key opportunities in the Healthcare Analytics Market include leveraging surging data volumes and EHR adoption, enhancing value-based care, and expanding AI and cloud computing use. Opportunities also lie in next-gen analytics for predictive insights and meeti…

item.title: AI dictation startup Wispr in funding talks at $2 billion value
item.description: Wispr AI Inc. is in discussions for a significant funding round. The deal could inject approximately $260 million into the company. This investment may more than double Wispr's valuation to $2 billion. Menlo Ventures is expected to lead the financing. Wispr d…

item.title: India's IT shares near three‑year low as OpenAI move revives AI fears
item.description: Indian IT stocks are unlikely to attract positive investor interest ‌unless global AI activity, cloud capex growth and cloud revenue ​momentum slow [OpenAI]

item.title: AMD Stock Plunges 5.27% to $434 as Profit-Taking Hits AI Chip Leader After Recent Rally
item.description: NEW YORK — Advanced Micro Devices Inc. shares tumbled more than 5% in midday trading Tuesday, falling to $434.59 as investors locked in gains following a sharp run-up in the artificial intelligence chipmaker's stock. [Intel, AMD]
